mapper.select: SELECT * FROM com_comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com_comment ( pgm_id, ref_id, parent_comment_id, writer, content, secret, password, spoiler, ins_dt, ins_id, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{pgmId}, #{refId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{writer}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{secret}, 'N'), #{password}, COALESCE(#{spoiler}, 'N'), NOW(), #{insId}, FALSE )
